emails.subject: FW: Fire Warden Class
emails.body: Tom, I am going to go to a Fire Warden Class today from 1:30 4:30 to become a Fire Warden for the new building. Is there anything you need me to do before I go to help you get packed up especially since you're working a half day tomorrow? To: Vuittonet, Laura

emails.subject: RE: Fire Warden Class
emails.body: I am fine. Don't forget that I here only half day tomorrow. Tom To: Martin, Thomas A.

emails.subject: RE: Fire Warden Class
emails.body: Oops, I can't read you already said that. To: Martin, Thomas A.
